+# CPM Conversion Report
+
+## 1. Conversion Overview
+
+| Item | Detail |
+|------|--------|
+| **Scope** | `Enterprise.slnx` solution |
+| **Projects converted** | 5 (Web, Api, Core, Legacy, Tests) |
+| **Packages centralized** | 8 unique `PackageVersion` entries |
+| **Shared props updated** | `Common.props` — removed `Version` from `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging` |
+| **MSBuild properties inlined** | `$(BlobsVersion)` (12.24.0), `$(HostingVersion)` (8.0.1) — removed from `Directory.Build.props` |
+| **Conditional versions** | `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` — conditional `PackageVersion` entries for net6.0 (6.0.36) and net8.0 (8.0.11) |
+
+## 2. Version Conflict Resolutions
+
+### System.Text.Json
+
+| Version | Projects |
+|---------|----------|
+| 10.0.1 | Web, Api, Tests |
+| 9.0.0 | Core |
+| 8.0.5 | Legacy |
+
+**Resolution**: Aligned to highest version (10.0.1). This is a major version bump for Core (9→10) and Legacy (8→10).
+
+**Impact**: Core and Legacy now resolve System.Text.Json 10.0.1 instead of their previous versions. Web, Api, and Tests are unchanged.
+
+### Azure.Storage.Blobs
+
+| Version | Projects |
+|---------|----------|
+| 12.24.0 | Api (was `$(BlobsVersion)`) |
+| 12.19.0 | Legacy |
+
+**Resolution**: Aligned to highest version (12.24.0). Minor/patch difference within the same major version.
+
+**Impact**: Legacy now resolves Azure.Storage.Blobs 12.24.0 instead of 12.19.0. Api is unchanged.
+
+## 3. Package Comparison — Baseline vs. Result
+
+### Changes
+
+| Project | TFM | Package | Before | After | Status |
+|---------|-----|---------|--------|-------|--------|
+| Core.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |
+| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 | 12.24.0 | Aligned to highest version |
+| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |
+
+### Unchanged
+
+| Project | TFM | Package | Version |
+|---------|-----|---------|---------|
+| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
+| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 |
+| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
+| Api.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
+| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
+| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 8.0.11 |
+| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
+| Api.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
+| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 |
+| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
+| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
+| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
+| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
+| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | xunit | 2.9.3 |
+| Web.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
+| Web.csproj | net8.0 | OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 |
+| Web.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
+
+## 4. Risk Assessment
+
+**[Moderate risk]** — Two packages changed versions due to conflict alignment:
+
+- **System.Text.Json** was bumped from 9.0.0 to 10.0.1 in Core and from 8.0.5 to 10.0.1 in Legacy. This is a major version change that may introduce breaking API changes in those projects.
+- **Azure.Storage.Blobs** was bumped from 12.19.0 to 12.24.0 in Legacy. This is a minor version bump within the same major version and is generally safe.
+
+Recommend running `dotnet test` to verify no regressions in Core and Legacy projects. Review System.Text.Json 10.0.x release notes for any breaking changes affecting those projects.
+
+## 5. Follow-Up Items
+
+1. **Test validation**: Run `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior, especially for Core and Legacy which received major version bumps for System.Text.Json.
+2. **Legacy net6.0 EOL**: The Legacy project targets net6.0, which is out of support. Consider upgrading to net8.0 or later.
+3. **Api net6.0 EOL**: The Api project multi-targets net6.0 and net8.0. Consider dropping the net6.0 target if it is no longer needed.
+4. **System.Text.Json breaking changes**: Review the [System.Text.Json 10.0 release notes](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/compatibility/) for any breaking changes affecting Core and Legacy.
+
+## 6. Artifacts and How to Use Them
+
+| Artifact | Description |
+|----------|-------------|
+| `baseline.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured before conversion |
+| `after-cpm.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured after conversion |
+| `baseline-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project before conversion |
+| `after-cpm-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project after conversion |
+| `convert-to-cpm.md` | This report file |
+
+Binary logs can be opened with [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/) for detailed build comparison and troubleshooting.
+
+Recommend running `dotnet test` as a final validation step before merging.
+
